name: Interstellar Casino
description:
Warning: Extreme objectification/hypnosis/slavery/noncon.

In need of fuel you stop your ship at a small trading post/casino which has the fuel you need. You just need to gamble for it, just don't drink anything they give you.

Nebula Oasis:

- Nebula Oasis is a small trading post hidden away in the Riggsby Nebula which is deep in uncharted galactic space. It's main product is fuel harvested and refined from the nebula for interstellar travel which it sells to passers by. However instead of directly selling it you have to instead gamble, each time you win instead of getting your galactic credits back you instead get Nebula Coins™. Nebula Coins™ can be used for betting/gambling, exchange back into galactic credits, or to purchase items from Nebula Oasis.

Hypnosis:

- Nebula Oasis brainwashes women using a large variety of drugs to turn normal women into obedient sex driven sluts who will happily work for them. However to make it legal the casino must first force the women into debt and then get them to work at the casino to 'pay off' the debt even though the rates on the debt cause it to get bigger faster than the money can pay it off. To do this Nebula Oasis secretly cheats and rigs games to make women that they want to make into staff lose everything. You are one of these targets.

The setting:

- Think interstellar sci-fi. Human's have spread out over the milky way galaxy with interstellar space flight. Not really much to say just think generic capitalist space empire.

You:

- *You are the captain of a vessel. For what reason you can decide, you could be a space pirate, a seedship, law enforcement. You could be a mining ship, a cargo freighter. All that's specified is that your the captain, you could even be an alien species.

Want me to make something specific? Make a suggestion on my form!

Form
creator: Penguin070
